title: desmodium marilandicum var. ciliare
intro: Desmodium marilandicum var. ciliare, also known as showy tick clover, is a plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant's leaves and stems are used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Traditional herbalists also value showy tick clover for its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health.
